title: capsella lata
intro: Capsella lata, also known as Shepherd's Purse, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that grows in the wild in many parts of the world. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anticoagulant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to prevent blood clots and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Capsella lata include its ability to aid in menstrual relief, reduce blood pressure, and support cardiovascular health. Capsella lata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
